urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
Kaysa Hai Yeh Charakhaa? Dil Dubey Jaa Raahai Hai, Kya Shaam Aagaya Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: What Kind Of Difficulty Is This? Our Hearts Are Sinking, Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
Hone Lagi Azaane, Kayse Saron Ko Dhaampe,
Bazu Bandhe Huwe Hai, Khun Ro Rahi Hai Aankhei
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Azaan Is Beginning, How Will We Cover Our Heads? Our Arms Are Tied Up, Our Eyes Are Shedding Tears Of Blood

urdu transliteration text:
Aankhon Ke Khun Se Raste Khun Mei Naha Rahe Hai. Kya Shaam Aagara Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Our Eyes, All Bloody, Are Looking At The Blood-soaked Roads. Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
Sajjad Ka Kaleja, Sad Paash Ho Raha Hai. Ik Eik Zakhm Inka, Is Gham Me Ro Raha Hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sajjad’s Liver Is In Great Anguish. Each Of His Wounds Are Crying In Grief

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab Ka Naam Lekar, Adaa Bula Rahe Hai. Kya Shaam Agaya Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Enemies Are Calling Zainab By Her Name. Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Nayze Pey Jitne Sar Hai, Ik Sar Hai Unmei Aysa. Aankhein Hai Bandhe Uski, Aur Khaak Par Hai Girta
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Of All The Heads On The Lances, There Is One Head Within Them, Whose Eyes Are Closed, And Keeps Falling On The Sand

urdu transliteration text:
Abbas Ka Yeh Sar Hai, Teywar Bata Rahai Hai. Kya Shaam Aagaya Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: This Is The Head Of Abbas, The Behaviour Makes It Clear. Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
Itna Chale Hai Pedhal, Kanto Pe Sare Qaydi. Thak Jati Chalte Chalte, Chalti Agar Zamin Bhi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Prisoners Have Walked Far On Many Thorns, The Ground Would Also Get Tired If It Walked This Much

urdu transliteration text:
Pero(n) Ke Able Bhi, Ansu Bahaa Rahe Hai. Kya Shaam Agayi Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Feet Are Also Shedding Tears. Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
Hai Log Kistarha Ke, Humse Dua Karaye. Aai Qaydiyon Dua Do, Yeh Din Na Ham Pe Aaye
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: What Kind Of People Are These? They Are Making Us Pray For Them. Saying, “Oh Prisoners Pray For Us That We Never See A Day Like Yours”

urdu transliteration text:
Lekar Duayen Hamse, Dil Bhi Dukha Rahai Hai. Kya Shaam Aagaya Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: They Take Our Prayers, But They Still Keep Hurting Our Hearts. Have We Reahed Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
Maaon Ke Gaudiyon Se, Lipte Huwe Hai Bache. Hai Haath Rassiyo(n) Mei, Maao(n) Ke Aise Jhakre
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Children Are Huddled In Their Mother’s Laps. The Mothers Hands Are Tied, How Can They Hold Them?

urdu transliteration text:
Bachhey Jo Gir Rahey Hai, Wo Marte Jaarahai Hai. Kya Shaam Aagaya Hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Children Which Are Falling,They Keep On Dying. Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?

urdu transliteration text:
"Rehan" Qaydiyo(n) Me, Barpa Tha Shor Girya. Palko(n) Se Kar Rahi Thi, Matam Jo Binte Zahra
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Rehan, Why Is There Sounds Of Wailing Within The Prisoners? The Daughter Of Zahra Was Doing Matam With Her Eyes

urdu transliteration text:
Sajad Nawha Khwan Hai, Nawha Suna Rahe Hai. Kya Shaam Aagaya Hai?
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sajjad Is The Poet And He Is Reciting A Nauha. Have We Reached Shaam?

urdu transliteration text:
Amma Fizza Batade Mujko
Pathar Kyu Aarahai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Mother Fizza, Please Tell Me Why Rocks Are Being Thrown At Us?
